report.summary: UX audited 2 new learn guides (DeFi Insurance, DVT), created 2 OG images (1200x630 SVG), and implemented 6 UX refinements including semantic HTML, accessibility, and mobile table improvements.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DVT guide: Wrapped in semantic <article> tag instead of React fragment for better SEO and accessibility
DVT guide: Added aria-label to Table of Contents nav element
DeFi Insurance: Added aria-label to Table of Contents nav element
DeFi Insurance: Protocol cards now show all 5 protocols instead of only top 3 (Neptune Mutual and Etherisc were previously hidden from card view)
DeFi Insurance: Added role='region', aria-label, and tabIndex to comparison table wrapper for keyboard-accessible scrolling
DVT guide: Added role='region', aria-label, tabIndex, and minWidth to SSV vs Obol comparison table for mobile scroll accessibility
Both pages: Added WebkitOverflowScrolling touch for smooth mobile table scrolling

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: defi-insurance-protocols-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with shield decorations, DeFi/Insurance/Intermediate badges, key stats ($1T+ TVL, <2% insured, $18M+ claims), protocol names listed

OG image: distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with DVT network node visualization, Staking/DVT/Intermediate badges, key stats (4M+ ETH, $2B staked, 1,000+ operators), topic tags

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Deferred)
items: Style inconsistency between pages: DeFi Insurance uses 26px H2 / 48px sections; DVT uses 32px H2 / 60px sections — recommend standardizing in a shared article layout component
FAQ styling differs: Insurance uses card-based Q/A; DVT uses borderBottom dividers — recommend picking one pattern for all learn guides
Neither page has a data freshness indicator (e.g., 'Prices from CoinGecko') — recommend adding for trust signals
ToC links lack focus:outline styles — recommend adding 2px solid #6366f1 outline on :focus-visible across all learn guides
